parsed_review.summary:
CP00-254 is a clean descriptor-only fixture-binding-slice continuation of the RP07 search-core program (range RP07.P05.M04.S13-RP07.P05.M06.S08, risk B, 40 units). All evidence supports the pack-level claim and closeout readiness; no P0-P3 findings.

Verified: (1) Structure/coverage — live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:412), baseline, manifest, and in-code SEARCH_CORE_CP254_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:343) agree on 40 units, range, risk B, deviation_from_plan:false; row counts M04=10/M05=22/M06=8 and deliverable distribution (impl 14, fixture 14, test 6, hermes 2, claude_review 2, security_audit 2) match the prompt exactly. (2) Descriptor-only/no-runtime/no-write — service.js builds frozen pure-data objects via freezeCp254Result with every runtime/dispatch/write flag false; grep found no writeFile/fetch/child_process/db/process.env/network in packages/search/src; index.js (unchanged) wildcard re-exports the new functions correctly. (3) Validation — validators.js validateSearchCoreCp254FixtureBindingSliceDescriptor enforces per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution:false plus specific guards (cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, unauthorized_data_omitted:true, dispatches_ai_runtime:false, id_drift_detected:false, executes_command_runtime:false, denied_case=denied_customer_safe), and all referenced row-extra keys resolve in the inherited CP252/CP253 chain; the deterministic .mjs validator deep-compares the contract projection against in-code constants and is read-only. (4) Tests — model.test.js has three CP254 tests covering coverage, descriptor-only rows, and evidence-packet/handoff boundaries. (5) Authority boundary — claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false; production_ready:false is the correct pre-review state; review request/prompt enforce read_only with [Read,Grep,Glob] only. (6) No-real-data — no PII/secrets; real_client_data_loaded:false, no_real_data:true. (7) Hermes used only for deterministic evidence-packet shape (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false). (8) CP178+ hardening — inherited forbidden_review_evidence covers failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing references, and final-approval/enterprise-trust claims; readiness-report auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1455-byte valid JSON).

The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) referenced in the manifest do not yet exist; this is by design — they are post-review-gated in the hardened sequence and produced after this Claude review, so their absence does not block. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approver.
